summary: Completed comprehensive testing of image upload functionality. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend upload UI elements verified on both Branding and Banners tabs. End-to-end upload flow tested successfully.

backend_api: POST /api/upload/image - upload valid PNG returns 200 with success:true, url, filename
GET /api/uploads/{filename} - uploaded file accessible via static serving (200)
frontend_branding_tab: Branding tab visible and navigable via data-testid='tab-branding'
Logo section shows URL input with data-testid='input-logoUrl'
Logo section shows Upload button with data-testid='upload-logo-btn'
Logo preview image appears when logoUrl has value (data-testid='logo-preview')
Upload flow: file upload -> toast 'Image uploaded' -> URL populated in input
frontend_banners_tab: Banners tab visible and navigable via data-testid='tab-banners'
Banner Image URL input found with data-testid='input-newBannerImage'
Banner Upload button found with data-testid='upload-banner-btn'
Existing banners displayed correctly (2 banners visible)
Add Banner button visible with data-testid='add-banner-btn'
e2e_upload_flow: Upload PNG via file input -> URL field populated with full API URL
Toast notification 'Image uploaded' displayed on success

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, E2E upload flow works)

seed_data_creation: None required - existing restaurant user used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image upload functionality fully implemented and working. Backend upload endpoint at POST /api/upload/image requires restaurant admin auth. Uploaded files served at GET /api/uploads/{filename}. Frontend has upload buttons in Branding tab (Logo) and Banners tab (Banner Image). Allowed extensions: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .gif, .webp, .svg. Max file size: 5MB. Upload flow: FormData POST -> returns {success, url, filename} -> frontend constructs full URL as API_URL + url.
